title: Repeater Crossbow
description: A Data Pack which adds a new Rapid-Fire Crossbow!
body:
![Repeater Crossbow Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b347daf008b424be0d8d6e77fcf3ee2fee417da.png)

# REQUIREMENTS
- [aolu Common Resources](https://modrinth.com/datapack/aolu-common-resources)
- If using Data Pack version: Copy and Paste the Data Pack into your Resource Packs folder and activate it\
**OR**\
Download [aolu Resourcepack Collection](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/aolu-resourcepack-collection)

## DESCRIPTION
The Repeater crossbow is a new Crossbow which can rapid fire up to 5 arrows in quick succession!
### MECHANICS
The crossbow stores up to 5 arrows which you can shoot individually without needing to draw the crossbow.\
Due to being able to rapid-fire arrows, they have a slower velocity and deal less damage\
However, If you wait a short duration before firing, you will perform a power-shot which will lessen the effects of the reduced arrow velocity and damage
### ENCHANTMENTS
2 new Crossbow enchantments have been added:
- **Velocity**: Increases Arrow Velocity by 45%
- **Burst**: Arrows create a small explosion on impact, but the arrow is also immediately destroyed
